zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hart II於1430年出生在英國素福爾可波時，他的父親John Harte I25歲，母親Anne Maydon20歲。他於大約1450年與Anne Hankeford結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1490年在英國英格蘭素福爾可維斯索普享年60歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可維斯索普。

nameMeanings.name: Hart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and North German: nickname from Middle English hert (Old English heorot), Middle Low German hërte, harte ‘hart, stag’, perhaps for a quick-footed or timorous individual.
German: variant of   Hardt   1 and 2. It is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name or nickname from German and Yiddish hart ‘hard’.

variants.name: Hartmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Klaus, Manfred, Dieter, Dietrich, Franz.
North German and Danish: variant of   Hart   1.

German and Swiss German: from an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements hard ‘hard, strong’ + man ‘man’. This surname is also found in the Netherlands, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, and some other European countries; see also below. Compare Hartman .

variants.name: Francoeur
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Jacques, Aime, Marcel, Normand, Alcide, Amie, Anselme, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Georges.
French:
soldier's name from franc coeur ‘sincere heart’.

variants.name: Hartin
meanings: Irish (Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArtáin ‘descendant of Artán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Art, a byname meaning ‘bear’ or ‘hero’. Compare Hart 8.
English: habitational name from Harting (Sussex), from the Old English personal name Heort + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas.

variants.name: Hartel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Erna, Gunter, Kurt, Lutz, Otto.
German (also Härtel): from a pet form of an ancient Germanic compound personal name based on the element hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’.
French (Normandy): occupational name, a derivative of   Hart   7.

variants.name: De Hart
meanings: Dutch: from Middle Dutch hart, modern Dutch hert ‘deer, hart’ or hart ‘heart’ (see Hart 5), with the definite article de ‘the’.

variants.name: Hardt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Ernst, Erwin, Frieda, Gerhard, Gottlieb, Gunther, Hans, Heinz, Reinhold, Udo.
German: topographic name for someone who lived by woods used as pasture, from Middle High German hart.
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic compound personal name beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’.

variants.name: Harten
meanings: North German: patronymic from   Hart   1.
Dutch: patronymic from   Hart   4.
Dutch (Van Harten): habitational name from a place so named near Renkum, Gelderland.

variants.name: Hartt
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of   Hart  .

variants.name: Harte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Sinead.
English and North German: variant of   Hart   1.
Dutch: variant of   Hart   4.

variants.name: Hartjes
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from a pet form of   Hart   4.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hart II was born in 1430, in Burgh, Suffolk, England, his father, John Harte I, was 25 and his mother, Anne Maydon, was 20. He married Anne Hankeford about 1450. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1490, in Westhorpe, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Westhorpe, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hart II est né en 1430, à Burgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Harte I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anne Maydon, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Anne Hankeford environ 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1490, à Westhorpe, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Westhorpe, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1490 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Westhorpe, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Westhorpe, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lui sposato Anne Hankeford circa 1450. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1490, nel Westhorpe, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Westhorpe, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hart IIが1430年にイギリススフォルクブルグで生まれた時，父John Harte Iは25歳，母Anne Maydonは20歳であった。約1450年にAnne Hankefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1490年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウエスソルペで60歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウエスソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hart II(이)가 1430년 영국 수폴크 버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Harte I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Maydon(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 Anne Hankeford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 웨스소에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 웨스소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hart II nasceu em 1430, em Burgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Harte I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anne Maydon, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Hankeford aproximadamente 1450. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1490, em Westhorpe, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Westhorpe, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Brantingham, Yorkshire, England, United: брантингхам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hart II родился в 1430 г. в местности бург, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Harte I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Maydon, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Hankeford около 1450 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1490 г. в местности вестаурп, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности вестаурп, суффолк, Англия.
